# Pull Request

## Description
Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Configuration change

- Item 1
- Item 2
- Item 3

## Testing
How was this tested?
- [ ] Tested on fresh macOS install
- [ ] Tested on existing setup with tools already installed
- [ ] Tested all installation options
- [ ] Shell scripts pass syntax validation (`bash -n`)
- [ ] Tested on macOS version: ___
- [ ] Tested on chip: M1/M2/M3/M4/M5/Intel

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added validation/error handling where appropriate
- [ ] I have tested the backup and restore functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md
